title: corynandra angulata
intro: Corynandra angulata is a plant species, also known as the "angled fruit," belonging to the family Capparaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Corynandra angulata include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are said to help in managing fever, skin conditions, and digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Corynandra angulata typically involve boiling the plant's parts, and the resulting decoction is used for medicinal purposes.
